stemHtml: The pilot of an aircraft flying IMC on an airway is uncertain about maintaining the required lateral separation from another aircraft. How can ATC verify if the necessary lateral separation between the aircraft is maintained?

options.a: Check that their tracks are more than 15° divergent using NDB, at a distance of at least 10 NM.
options.b: Require both pilots to report position to check that they are in different geographical regions.
options.c: Check ATS filed flight plans to verify that different routes were filed.
options.d: Check that their tracks are more than 30° divergent using VOR, at a distance of at least 15 NM.
